title: FraudRiskScore
description: Fraud risk score event emitted by the Northwind risk scoring pipeline. Published to WEALTH_LA.infosec.security.fraud.risk-scores.v3.

score.description: Normalised risk score between 0 (no risk) and 1 (highest risk).

reason.description: Primary reason code for the risk score.

evaluated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the score was computed.

metadata.description: Optional key-value pairs for additional scoring context.
